content:
# CV - Rayu Choeng

## Contact Information
- **Portfolio**: https://rayu-choeng.tech
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Choeng-Rayu
- **Location**: Cambodia

## Profile Summary
Hands-on software engineering student driven by curiosity, discipline, and purpose. Coming from a financially challenged family, I see education and technology as tools for change. I specialize in creating innovative web applications and software solutions using modern technologies.

## Education

### Cambodia Academy of Digital Technology
**Bachelor's in Computer Science** *(Currently Year 3)*
*January 2024 – Present*
- Specializing in Software Engineering
- Programming languages: Java, C++, C
- Web development: React.js, HTML, CSS
- **Scholarship**: Techo Digital Talent Scholarship

### Joint ALCPP Program In The Capacity Specialists
*November 2024 – Present*
- 5-month program (3 months classroom + 2 months internship)
- Focus areas: Teamwork, Communication, Growth Mindset, Critical Thinking

### Hun Sen Borey 100 Knong High School
**Baccalauréat (Bac II), Grade B**
*Graduated: November 24, 2023*

## Certifications & Training

### CISCO Networking Academy
**IT Essentials: PC Hardware and Software**
*Completed: May 14, 2024*

### NICC 12th Startup Camp
**TechTourism Ignite**
*Completed: September 14, 2024*

## Work Experience

### Part-Time Math Tutor
*2024 – February 2025*
- Conducted one-on-one tutoring sessions for Grade 4 and Grade 8 students
- Focused on improving mathematical concepts and problem-solving skills
- 2 years experience teaching math in both Khmer and English

## Volunteer Experience

### Khoding-Hero Volunteer Program
**Team Leader & Instructor**
*August – September 2024*
- Led a three-member team teaching 700 students
- Taught ICT and coding with Scratch
- Managed digital registration and attendance tracking

### My First Stock Campaign
**Volunteer Leader**
*October 2024*
- Led all volunteer members for three days promoting stock market interest

## Projects

### Finwise.space - Financial Management Platform
**Full Stack Project**
- Smart financial management platform for tracking income, expenses, and savings
- Technologies: Node.js, React, MySQL, Telegram Bot, VPS Hosting with Nginx

### HybridCoffee.me - Coffee Ordering System
**Web Platform**
- Digital coffee ordering system
- Technologies: Telegram API, Node.js, MongoDB, Webhook

### Telegram AI Math Bot
**Chat Bot Assistance**
- Free AI assistant helping high school students learn math
- Technologies: DeepSeek API, Telegram API, Python

### E-Commerce Platform (Full Stack)
**Offline Application**
- Full-featured with cart, buy/sell products, payments, and inventory management
- Technologies: Java Programming, Swing, MySQL

### Portfolio Website
**Interactive Portfolio**
- Interactive portfolio with 3D elements and smooth animations
- Technologies: React.js, Framer Motion, EmailJS

## Technical Skills

### Programming Languages
- Java, JavaScript, C++, C, Python

### Web Development
- React.js, HTML5, CSS3, Framer Motion, REST APIs, Responsive Design

### Databases & Tools
- MySQL, MongoDB, Git, GitHub, Telegram Bot API, Digital Ocean, Nginx

### Additional Skills
- Problem Solving, Communication, Team Collaboration, Critical Thinking, AI Tools

## Languages
- **Khmer**: Native
- **English**: Professional Proficiency

## Interests
- Health Technology, FinTech & Financial Literacy, Robotics & Automation, Smart Cities, Automotive & Mechanical Systems

## Status
**Open to Internships and Opportunities**
